Modern Community Clinic

Compassionate care, rooted in faith.

PhilCHAN Cebu provides free, confidential HIV testing, pastoral support, and medical care in a dignified and welcoming environment.

Find Testing CenterCall Hotline
100% Confidential
Free Testing
Our Services

Comprehensive Care & Support

We offer a holistic approach to health, combining professional medical services with deep compassion and faith-based support.

Confidential HIV Testing

Rapid, safe, and completely free testing conducted with the highest standards of privacy and clinical accuracy.

Pastoral Care & Counseling

Faith-based emotional and spiritual support tailored to your journey, provided in a welcoming, non-judgmental space.

Medical Navigation

Professional guidance through healthcare systems, including assistance with treatment access and ongoing care coordination.

Community Education

Outreach programs designed to break down stigma, raise awareness, and foster a supportive, informed society.

Visit Our Center

Find Us

Our clinic is located at Mt. Zion Center in Talamban.

PhilCHAN Community Center

Address

Mt. Zion Center, Tigbao

Talamban, Cebu City, Philippines

Clinic Hours

  • Monday – Friday8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
  • Saturday & SundayClosed

Hotline

0966 910 9662

Email

Get Directions

PhilCHAN Cebu

Philippine Catholic HIV/AIDS Network Inc. - Cebu Chapter. Providing free, dignified, and confidential health services to our community.
